queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of lacking a formal savings account on credit default probability and risk mitigation.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of default: How minimal savings balances below 100 DM influence credit risk drivers and lower default likelihood.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers: The relationship between negative checking account balances and reduced probability of loan default.
